hooks.command: P=/home/cosmic/Projects/starforge_edu; printf "%s\n" "📋 ACTIVE PROJECT: starforge_edu — 14-day production build. READ PLAN_14DAY.md (the full plan)." "Completed day-commits so far:"; (git -C "$P" log --oneline 2>/dev/null | grep -oiE "\(Day [0-9]+\)" | sort -u) || true; printf "%s\n" "→ RESUME from the next incomplete day. Verify progress with TaskList + the dayN-*.md memory files. End every day green: ruff + mypy + pytest + manage.py check."
